tickets.title: The program is crashing
tickets.content: The program is crashing when I try to open it. I've tried restarting the program and my computer, but it's still crashing.

tickets.title: Saved work sometimes gets deleted
tickets.content: I lost my saved work. I was working on it for hours and then the program crashed.

tickets.title: Misaligned text
tickets.content: The text is misaligned in the program. I've tried everything to fix it, but it's still misaligned.
